title: An agent failed — what next?
failedTimes: {{agent}} failed {{n, number}} times in a row.
suggestDisable: This agent keeps failing. Remove it from the circuit to keep the rest of the run going without it — your saved agent settings stay unchanged.
retryTurnDesc: attempt this agent's turn again now.
skipTurnDesc: drop this turn and continue the run.
removeFromCircuitDesc: take this agent out for the rest of the run.
